utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each one is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with detailed coverage and costs; property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with coverage details and cost; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with coverage and cost; additional_services includes enhancement services with cost; total_budget provides both monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists the provider as 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst' for health coverage. In the ground-truth ratings, the relevant physical health options are 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) and 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8). Since the assistant used both names, both correspond. For mental health, the same provider naming applies, so both 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) and 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8) are relevant. For property coverage, the plan offers global protection at €55/month, which matches 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8) in cost and description (home contents, electronics, etc.). For travel coverage (global medical/emergency at €55/month), the best match in the ground-truth list is 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) since it has the same cost and global focus. For additional services, 'premium_membership' corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 6).
